findings.title: DES encryption used for data protection
findings.description: Application uses DES in ECB mode to encrypt sensitive records; DES has a 56-bit key trivially brute-forced with modern hardware

findings.title: Hardcoded encryption key
findings.description: DES encryption key hardcoded as plaintext byte string in source code

findings.title: MD5 used for password hashing
findings.description: User passwords hashed with unsalted MD5 which is cryptographically broken for password storage

findings.title: MD5 used for data integrity signatures
findings.description: Integrity signatures computed using MD5 concatenation instead of HMAC, vulnerable to collision attacks

findings.title: Predictable session token generation via seeded PRNG
findings.description: Session tokens generated using random module seeded with predictable time-based value

findings.title: Predictable API token generation
findings.description: API tokens generated by hashing predictable sequential counter and timestamp values
